topics.label: PAKCS/KiCS2 Setup
topics.description: Install PAKCS or KiCS2. Curry combines Haskell-like FP with logic programming.

topics.label: Functions & Types
topics.description: Haskell-like syntax with type inference and algebraic data types.

topics.label: Non-Determinism
topics.description: Functions can return multiple values. x ? y is a non-deterministic choice.

topics.label: Free Variables
topics.description: Unbound variables solved by narrowing. Combine functional evaluation with search.

topics.label: Constraints
topics.description: Unification constraints for logic programming within functional code.

topics.label: I/O & Monads
topics.description: IO monad for side effects, similar to Haskell.
